In this article, the focus is not on the transdermal absorption of ibuprofen (IBU).

This study focuses on using ibuprofen as a model drug to develop a novel wound dressing or tissue engineering scaffold capable of **prolonged sustained drug release without dangerous “sudden release”**. This is outside the scope of our study.
Unlike strategies involving physical blending of excipients, this study completely transformed the physicochemical properties of ibuprofen through chemical salt formation.
